headline: Clear window opens Friday — trellis beans, snap scapes
weather_notes: Schedule outdoor work for Friday — today's 30% morning storm risk clears tonight; Friday (72°F, 0% rain) is the first fully dry window of the week.
Check potato_bags moisture daily — 2-day-old Yukon Gold sets in bags dry out faster than raised beds as temps climb to 82–86°F this weekend.

suggested_tasks.title: Install trellis in c1 bean bed
suggested_tasks.description: Good Mother Stollard (pole bean) sprouted May 13 — at day 18, vines need vertical support now before they tangle during the warm-up to 82°F Saturday.

suggested_tasks.title: Snap scapes on w3 Italian Red garlic
suggested_tasks.description: Late May is peak scape time for hardneck garlic — remove curled scapes Friday to redirect energy to bulb development before the July harvest.
